speaker: charlie
text: Thanks Sam! Now let's talk sport, and there's some exciting buzz around Australian cycling's future. Grace Brown has been discussing what's next for Aussie cycling after some recent shake-ups in the sport.

speaker: alice
text: Speaking of the future, there are some massive sporting events coming up this year. We've got the AFL Gather Round heading to South Australia, the United Cup tennis bringing world-class action to Sydney and Perth, plus the F1 Australian Grand Prix kicking off the 2026 season.

speaker: charlie
text: And here's something really heartwarming - the 2026 Australian Pride in Sport Awards just announced their winners, celebrating organisations making sport more inclusive for LGBTQ+ athletes and fans. UWA Sport took out Sporting Organisation of the Year - legends!
